transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Rivergate Clinic scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez. It's currently on the 14th.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, Melissa Beaumont, thank you. What day would you like to move your appointment to?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, actually can we push it to next Thursday instead of the 14th?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure thing. I have you moved to Thursday the 21st at 10 a.m. with Dr. Alvarez.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That works. Do I need to bring anything with me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just your insurance card and a photo ID. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Melissa. Have a good rest of your day.
